name: Shuren
description: Shuren is a resident of Hell. He leads a group of three other Togabito. He is an antagonist of the fourth Bleach movie.    Like other Togabito, he wears a white body suit with unusual square patterns with black fabric wrapped around his left leg, a cloak and red chains and shackles on his neck and chest. He also wears the standard mask the known members seem to wear, although he wears his on his chest. He has purple hair parted in a long fringe on the left side of his face.
